rulings.Case Title: DANNY HOM et al VS. ALLEN LEE PLUMBING CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or The Alt Summ Summ Adj; Evidence
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 18, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT THE 1991 LIPMAN FAMILY TRUST, JULIE BERNARD, CITIBROKERS REAL ESTATE CO., and ABRAHAM UZIEL's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issues of fact remain as to the following causes of action: Plaintiff Danny Hom and Jennifer Tjon's claims for general negligence, negligence under the peculiar risk doctrine, negligence under the unsafe premises doctrine, negligence for hiring, and Plaintiff Allstate's claim for subrogation. Questions remain about whether there was a duty and whether there was a beach. Defendants the 1991 Lipman Family Trust, Julie Bernard, Citibrokers Real Estate Co., and Abraham Uziel's Motion for Summary Adjudication as to Plaintiff Danny Hom and Jennifer Tjon's claims for strict liability for ultrahazardous activity and breach of the warranty of habitability is GRANTED as a matter of law. Plaintiffs gave failed to meet their burden in rebuttal. = (501/RAK) - (Late Tentative)

rulings.Case Title: DIONE POE et al VS. LAWRENCE CHOY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 18, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SUTTON's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED IN PART WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AND OVERRULED RULE IN PART. The Court overrules the demurrer as to the following causes of action: negligence, warranty of quiet enjoyment, negligent infliction of emotional distress, and intentional infliction of emotional distress, and fraud. The demurrer is sustained as to the claim for violation of the San Francisco Rent Ordinance. = (501/RAK) - (Late Tentative)
